label: Health outcome valuations for policy appraisal

qaly.label: Value of a Quality-Adjusted Life Year
qaly.context: Green Book / DHSC recommended value for cross-government appraisal

nice_threshold_low.label: NICE cost-effectiveness threshold (lower bound)
nice_threshold_low.context: For NHS resource allocation decisions. Different purpose from Green Book QALY.

nice_threshold_high.label: NICE cost-effectiveness threshold (upper bound)
nice_threshold_high.context: Rising to GBP 25,000-35,000 from April 2026 (first increase since 1999)

daly.label: Value of a Disability-Adjusted Life Year averted
daly.context: Treated symmetrically with QALY for CBA purposes (1 DALY averted ~ 1 QALY gained), though conceptually different

source.publication: The Green Book 2026; NICE Methods Guide
source.publisher: HM Treasury; National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
